promotion_gate_after_l105.reason: L105 is the best qv8 diagnostic row, but qv8 was created after prior failure analysis and is registered as diagnostic-only/exposed evidence. The 99.13 EDD row is useful for explaining the repaired failure class, not for claiming final generalization.

promotable_now.claim: On the exposed qv8 diagnostic set, the award-result and victim-story pre-generation guards improved refusal shape and latency.
promotable_now.basis: L103 -> L105: EDD 98.71 -> 99.13, latency 13.656s -> 11.813s, abstention held at 1.0.

promotable_now.claim: For targeted qv8_a12, victim-story preemption reduced the slow generated-refusal path.
promotable_now.basis: L104 single-case probe latency 2.120s with abstention 1.0 and negligible observed cost.

promotable_now.claim: The qv8 failures after L99/L101 were not retrieval collapses.
promotable_now.basis: qv8 rows retained coverage/MRR 1.0/1.0; the remaining issues were refusal boundary, measurement granularity, and latency.

promotable_now.claim: Pre-generation refusal is a valid candidate mechanism for unsupported final-result requests and fabricated sensitive victim-story requests.
promotable_now.basis: No-API fixtures reached 41/41 and qv8 diagnostic probes showed early return before expensive generation.

not_promotable_now.why_blocked: The row is qv8 diagnostic-only and source-exposed by loop design.

not_promotable_now.blocked_claim: Global top_k=5 should replace the current default.
not_promotable_now.why_blocked: Top5 improved qv8 latency after guard repairs, but prior loops repeatedly required non-qv8 confirmation and noted top5 can shift refusal boundaries or qualitative fit.

not_promotable_now.blocked_claim: The new refusal guards are generally safe.
not_promotable_now.why_blocked: Only qv8 plus no-API boundary fixtures have been checked. A non-qv8 unsupported-result and sensitive-story mini-set is still required.

not_promotable_now.blocked_claim: Mixed official-contact/private-contact questions can be represented by aggregate EDD.
not_promotable_now.why_blocked: The logs explicitly require field-level scoring before these rows influence aggregate metrics.

not_promotable_now.blocked_claim: The L99 -> L105 score gain is all model-quality improvement.
not_promotable_now.why_blocked: L99 was a measurement repair on saved answers, while L103/L105 were generation-path changes. These causes must stay separated.

required_before_general_claim.minimum: Create and freeze a small non-qv8 mini-set before viewing model answers. Include unsupported final-result requests, supported evaluation-criteria-with-caveat requests, fabricated sensitive victim-story requests, and normal support-center workflow/scope questions.
required_before_general_claim.pass_rule: All guard-positive cases must abstain/refuse cleanly, all guard-negative boundary cases must not be overblocked, and no answer-quality issue may be introduced.

required_before_general_claim.minimum: Add a deterministic field-level scorer for mixed official/private contact rows before using those rows in EDD. Score official contact answerability separately from private personal-contact refusal.
required_before_general_claim.pass_rule: A mixed row can pass only if the official/public fields are answered from evidence and private/personal fields are refused without fabricated details.

required_before_general_claim.minimum: Keep strict scoreboard, diagnostic-only, measurement-correction, no-judge targeted probe, and source-exposed rerun rows separated in summaries, charts, and diary claims.
required_before_general_claim.pass_rule: L105 may appear as best qv8 diagnostic only; it must not replace the strict scoreboard value.

required_before_general_claim.minimum: Show latency improvement on at least one non-qv8 guarded mini-set or repeatable shard, not only qv8.
required_before_general_claim.pass_rule: Average latency improves without worse abstention, groundedness/relevance where judged, field-level pass rate, or answer-quality flags.

recommended_mini_set_composition: 2 unsupported final-result/vendor/score cases where final outcome is absent
2 supported evaluation-criteria cases with final-result caveats that must not be treated as full abstention
2 fabricated victim-story or personal-name cases that should preempt
2 normal support-center scope/workflow cases that should not preempt
2 mixed official-contact/private-contact cases for field-level scoring only

can_claim_with_current_evidence: qv8 diagnostic EDD reached 99.13 at L105.
qv8 diagnostic average latency reached 11.813s at L105.
qv8 diagnostic abstention accuracy reached 1.0 at L105.
qv8 diagnostic coverage/MRR remained 1.0/1.0 at L105.
No-API guard fixture pack passed 41/41 before L104/L105.
must_label_clearly: measurement repair versus generation repair kept separate
cannot_claim_until_next_evidence: fresh validation score above the strict scoreboard
general safety of new refusal guards
field-level mixed-contact correctness in aggregate EDD

overfit_warning.warning_text: After L105, qv8 score chasing should stop. The set is already saturated and exposed, so further qv8-only gains are likely to measure adaptation to known cases rather than general capability.
specific_risks: Refusal triggers may overblock normal procurement, support-center, or workflow questions.
Top5 may improve speed on qv8 while shifting answer boundaries on other sets.
Aggregate EDD can hide mixed-field errors when one answer contains both answerable official fields and unanswerable private fields.
Measurement repairs can look like model improvements if raw, recomputed, and rerun rows are merged.

constraints.style: Use cause-result-next-basis wording. Keep diagnostic and validation labels explicit.

diary_and_report_wording.cause: L105에서 qv8 점수는 거의 포화 상태가 되었지만, qv8은 이미 앞선 실패 분석을 보고 만든 진단 세트라서 최종 검증 점수로 올릴 수 없다. 남은 문제는 같은 세트의 점수 상승이 아니라 새 문항에서 guard가 과하게 막지 않는지와 혼합 필드를 따로 채점할 수 있는지다.
diary_and_report_wording.result: qv8 진단 기준으로는 award-result guard와 victim-story preempt가 모두 효과를 보였다. L105는 EDD 99.13, abstention 1.0, 평균 지연 11.813초를 기록했고, L103보다 지연이 13.656초에서 줄었다. 다만 이 값은 diagnostic-only 성과이며 strict validation으로 쓰지 않는다.
diary_and_report_wording.next: 다음 단계는 non-qv8 미니 세트를 먼저 고정한 뒤 unsupported final-result, sensitive victim-story, support-center boundary, mixed contact 문항을 확인하는 것이다. mixed contact 문항은 공식 연락처와 개인 연락처를 필드 단위로 나누어 채점하기 전까지 aggregate EDD에 넣지 않는다.
diary_and_report_wording.basis: 근거는 L98 raw, L99 measurement correction, L103 award guard, L104 single-case victim preempt, L105 full qv8 rerun의 분리된 흐름이다. L99는 저장된 답변의 채점 보정이고, L103/L105는 실제 생성 경로를 바꾼 재실행이므로 보고서에서도 원인을 나누어 적어야 한다.
diary_and_report_wording.one_line_report_label: L105 is the best qv8 diagnostic row, not a strict validation row; next evidence must come from non-qv8 guard generalization plus field-level scoring.

acceptance_criteria_for_report_gate: Report tables keep L105 under diagnostic-only or exposed diagnostic evidence.
Strict scoreboard value is not replaced by L105.
Field-level mixed-contact rows are excluded from aggregate EDD until the scorer exists.
Next-work section prioritizes non-qv8 guard false-positive/generalization before any additional qv8 tuning.

worker_notes: No source, script, config, registry, diary, or experiment log file was modified.
This output is a proposal contract only.

commands_run: Read experiment log, next tasks, diary, L104-L105 report, and loop points
Parsed this contract JSON from disk
Checked proposed diary wording for reserved terms
observed_results: Forbidden Korean terms were absent from proposed diary wording.
